# synology-apm log — Backup Server Logs

All log commands operate on a single backup server, resolved by `NAME` (search mode)
or `--id <server-id>` (direct mode; get IDs from `synology-apm infra server list --verbose`).

See [apm-shared](../apm-shared/SKILL.md) for global options, output formats, and
confirmation rules.

## Commands

### `synology-apm log activity list`

List activity logs for a backup server.

**Search mode (server name keyword):**

```sh
synology-apm log activity list "apm-server-01"
```

**Direct mode (server ID from synology-apm infra server list --verbose):**

```sh
synology-apm log activity list --id <server-id>
```

```
Usage: synology-apm log activity list [OPTIONS] [NAME]
```

| Flag | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `[NAME]` | Server name keyword (search mode) |
| `--id <SERVER_ID>` | Backup Server ID (direct mode; from synology-apm infra server list --verbose) |
| `--level <info/warning/error, ...>` | Severity filter, repeatable: information / warning / error |
| `--type <protection/system/data_access>` | Log type filter: protection / system / data_access |
| `--since <SINCE>` | Start time: 1h / 24h / 7d or ISO 8601 (e.g. 2026-04-01T00:00:00) |
| `--until <UNTIL>` | End time: 1h / 24h / 7d or ISO 8601 (e.g. 2026-04-20T23:59:59) |
| `--search <SEARCH>` | Keyword search |

### `synology-apm log drive list`

List drive information logs for a backup server.

**Search mode (server name keyword):**

```sh
synology-apm log drive list "apm-server-01"
```

**Direct mode (server ID from synology-apm infra server list --verbose):**

```sh
synology-apm log drive list --id <server-id>
```

```
Usage: synology-apm log drive list [OPTIONS] [NAME]
```

| Flag | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `[NAME]` | Server name keyword (search mode) |
| `--id <SERVER_ID>` | Backup Server ID (direct mode; from synology-apm infra server list --verbose) |
| `--level <info/warning/error, ...>` | Severity filter, repeatable: information / warning / error |
| `--since <SINCE>` | Start time: 1h / 24h / 7d or ISO 8601 (e.g. 2026-04-01T00:00:00) |
| `--until <UNTIL>` | End time: 1h / 24h / 7d or ISO 8601 (e.g. 2026-04-20T23:59:59) |
| `--search <SEARCH>` | Keyword search |
| `--location <LOCATION>` | Drive location filter |

### `synology-apm log connection list`

List connection logs for a backup server.

**Search mode (server name keyword):**

```sh
synology-apm log connection list "apm-server-01"
```

**Direct mode (server ID from synology-apm infra server list --verbose):**

```sh
synology-apm log connection list --id <server-id>
```

```
Usage: synology-apm log connection list [OPTIONS] [NAME]
```

| Flag | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `[NAME]` | Server name keyword (search mode) |
| `--id <SERVER_ID>` | Backup Server ID (direct mode; from synology-apm infra server list --verbose) |
| `--level <info/warning/error, ...>` | Severity filter, repeatable: information / warning / error |
| `--since <SINCE>` | Start time: 1h / 24h / 7d or ISO 8601 (e.g. 2026-04-01T00:00:00) |
| `--until <UNTIL>` | End time: 1h / 24h / 7d or ISO 8601 (e.g. 2026-04-20T23:59:59) |
| `--search <SEARCH>` | Keyword search |

### `synology-apm log system list`

List advanced system logs for a backup server.

**Search mode (server name keyword):**

```sh
synology-apm log system list "apm-server-01"
```

**Direct mode (server ID from synology-apm infra server list --verbose):**

```sh
synology-apm log system list --id <server-id>
```

```
Usage: synology-apm log system list [OPTIONS] [NAME]
```

| Flag | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `[NAME]` | Server name keyword (search mode) |
| `--id <SERVER_ID>` | Backup Server ID (direct mode; from synology-apm infra server list --verbose) |
| `--level <info/warning/error, ...>` | Severity filter, repeatable: information / warning / error |
| `--since <SINCE>` | Start time: 1h / 24h / 7d or ISO 8601 (e.g. 2026-04-01T00:00:00) |
| `--until <UNTIL>` | End time: 1h / 24h / 7d or ISO 8601 (e.g. 2026-04-20T23:59:59) |
| `--search <SEARCH>` | Keyword search |

## Tips

- Filter by `--level` (repeatable: info/warning/error), `--since`/`--until`, and
  `--search` (keyword).
- `log activity list` additionally supports `--type` (protection/system/data_access).
- `log drive list` additionally supports `--location`.
